mapper.insert: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO tb_image_asset_source (create_time,asset_id,source_type,source_system,source_entity_type,source_entity_id,source_task_id,source_execution_id,original_filename,source_metadata) VALUES (#{source.createTime},#{source.assetId},#{source.sourceType},#{source.sourceSystem},#{source.sourceEntityType}, #{source.sourceEntityId},#{source.sourceTaskId},#{source.sourceExecutionId},#{source.originalFilename},#{source.sourceMetadata})

INSERT INTO tb_image_asset_source (create_time,asset_id,source_type,source_system,source_entity_type,source_entity_id,source_task_id,source_execution_id,original_filename,source_metadata) VALUES (#{source.createTime},#{source.assetId},#{source.sourceType},#{source.sourceSystem},#{source.sourceEntityType}, #{source.sourceEntityId},#{source.sourceTaskId},#{source.sourceExecutionId},#{source.originalFilename},#{source.sourceMetadata}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_image_asset_source WHERE asset_id=#{assetId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_image_asset_source WHERE source_task_id=#{taskId} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_image_asset_source WHERE source_execution_id=#{executionId} LIMIT 1
